tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows significant hyperglycemia with normal HbA1c, suggesting possible acute glucose elevation. Lipid profile reveals marked hypercholesterolemia, hypertriglyceridemia, elevated LDL, and low HDL, indicating high cardiovascular risk. Mildly decreased CO₂ may suggest metabolic acidosis. Renal function and microalbumin/creatinine are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for diabetes and metabolic syndrome, and prompt management of dyslipidemia.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
